creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
This is your sign to try the newest desserts in London🍰

Recently opened near Chinatown, Mille Rêves serves beautifully crafted sweet and savoury Vinyl Mille-Feville creations that are almost too pretty to eat✨

Menu highlights include:
🍓 Strawberry Rêve
🥭 Mango Custard
🍫 Dubai Chocolate
💚 Matcha Red Bean Strawberry
🥤 Frappuccinos & Fruit Drinks

Perfect for an afternoon treat, a catch-up with friends, or simply when you’re looking for something new to try while exploring London😊

📍 Chinatown, London W1D 5EB @millereves25 

#london #londondesserts #chinatownlondon #londonfood #londonspots
